title: March 28th Cast Live Talk
wikitext:
[]: March 28th Cast Live Talk             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat Mar 27, 2021 11:54 pm Some of you might be aware that the Shin cast (with some notable exceptions like Saakamoto) are holding a live talk after a screening in March 28th (or just now in Japan time). Should we have a separate thread for it, and collect any possible information and translations for it? tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: March 28th Cast Live Talk             Quote Post by Whitetiger739 » Sun Mar 28, 2021 4:08 am Originally brought to my attention by this reddit post: https://www.reddit.com/r/evangelion/comments/mex0zf/conversation_of_evangelion_voice_actors_no/ Here's some recent Youtube videos with only 15 mins of the Cast Live Talk: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xqKhRERcLYE & https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CbZdTHRM76E although I can't find the ending or the rest of broadcast. Couple of Japanese articles ( https://www.oricon.co.jp/news/2188468/full/ & https://av.watch.impress.co.jp/docs/news/1314909.html & https://news.yahoo.co.jp/articles/0f2fbfb8301e8ed789bbdfe74ab15a573511c454 ) summary and discussion of the voice actors/actresses on behind the scene and their thoughts on Evangelion franchise throughout their careers without spoiling Shin Eva since the cast talk is held before showing the movie. It would be appreciated if anyone found a full broadcast of the cast talk and translated what the voice actors/actresses are saying!

[]: Re: March 28th Cast Live Talk             Quote Post by kuro hazama » Sun Mar 28, 2021 7:13 am You could expect a some video of this in the BD if this is going to be like the shin godzilla special edition

[]: Re: March 28th Cast Live Talk             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Mar 28, 2021 1:57 pm Whitetiger739 wrote: It would be appreciated if anyone found a full broadcast of the cast talk and translated what the voice actors/actresses are saying!

[]: Re: March 28th Cast Live Talk             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Mar 28, 2021 2:23 pm Tines probably has all of them, yes. But it doesn't seem to have anything too juicy. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8QEE_Lf5_94 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1KJPC_iiQgc https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2l6PQZym2h0 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0bG_kPPqiXg https://www.youtube.com/user/TheTelevisionCH/videos https://gyao.yahoo.co.jp/episode/606d69 ... 5e116c5638 Some very amusing notes: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: March 28th Cast Live Talk             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Mar 28, 2021 2:53 pm Can someone break down for those of us not super-familiar with Japanese VAs who is who there from left to right?

[]: Re: March 28th Cast Live Talk             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Mar 28, 2021 8:04 pm That Japanese blog also posted a summary of it: https://ha-navi.com/eva-328 These articles too: https://news.livedoor.com/article/detail/19928341/ https://natalie.mu/comic/news/422153

[]: Re: March 28th Cast Live Talk             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Mar 29, 2021 4:51 pm The whole thing -- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gpfi_DITAeI

[]: Re: March 28th Cast Live Talk             Quote Post by Pluto » Mon Mar 29, 2021 9:54 pm FelipeFritschF wrote: Tines probably has all of them, yes. But it doesn't seem to have anything too juicy. Some very amusing notes: Yamadera: "I'm happy I managed to get in it. It's not like I have that many lines, and then Anno "sorry I'm going to cut this". He was deeply impressed by Anno and staff on The Professional. Eva is unique work in entertainment work, Kaji is one of my representative roles. Thanks very much yay

[]: Re: March 28th Cast Live Talk             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Thu Apr 08, 2021 6:57 am Huh, interesting. Kaji has been a subject of several cut contents in 2.0 and two unfinished but voiced scenes were included as special features in the 2.22 Blu-ray. I wonder if Anno cut it out of storytelling necessity or wanting to make the film shorter under the distributors' demands.

Should we have a separate thread for it, and collect any possible information and translations for it? tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySe
